title: Security: SameSite Cookie Bypass via BackgroundFetch
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
BackgroundFetch sends all cookies ignoring the SameSite attribute.  
  
**VERSION**   
Chrome Version: Version 92.0.4515.159 (Official Build) Arch Linux (64-bit)  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
Set a cookie with `SameSite=Strict` here: https://foregoing-sulky-carpenter.gli
